title: rba / rate decision / cash rate | Rate Decision | Media conference: Monetary Policy Decision – 9 December 2025
summary: The RBA Board left the cash rate unchanged at 3.6% on December 9, 2025, with no rate cut considered at the meeting. Governor Michele Bullock noted that September quarter inflation came in stronger than expected with signs of persistence, tilting the balance of risks to the upside. The Board discussed circumstances under which rate hikes might be needed if inflation proves persistent and does not move back toward the 2.5% target.
